user.title: Alexa Smart Home — Connection Settings
user.description: Configure your Amazon Alexa region and language.

data_description.amazon_domain: The Amazon domain where your devices are registered.
data_description.language: The language/locale code for your Alexa account.
data_description.proxy_port: Port for the local login helper server (default: 9000).
data_description.cache_ttl: How long to cache device states before re-fetching (30–3600 seconds).

auth.title: Alexa Smart Home — Amazon Login
auth.description:
## Login in 2 steps

1. Open **[{server_url}]({server_url})** in your browser — you will see the Amazon login page
2. Log in to your Amazon account — the session is captured automatically

Once logged in, return here and click **Submit** to finish setup.

error.auth_not_complete: Login not detected yet. Complete the steps in the browser first, then click Submit.
error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the Alexa API. Check your network connection.
error.invalid_auth: The session is invalid or expired. Please re-authenticate.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check the Home Assistant logs for details.

abort.already_configured: This Alexa account is already configured.
